## Description
Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed.

## Type of change
- [ ] New skill (component)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Example addition

## Checklist:
- [ ] I have updated `index.js` and `index.json`.
- [ ] I have added a `references/` folder for my new skill.
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project.
